betaNotice.title: Beta Registration Notice
betaNotice.description: During beta testing, registration is by invitation only. Please register through an invitation link, and the system will automatically fill in the invitation code and email.

batchEdit.title: Batch Edit
batchEdit.description: Select edit type and operation mode to batch update selected records

warning.largeBatch: Large number of selected records ({{count}}), system will process in batches, max {{batchSize}} records per batch

errors.title: Batch Edit Failed
errors.noEntriesSelected: Please select time logs to edit first

persons.replaceDescription: Will replace all existing related persons
persons.addDescription: Will add to existing related persons

task.description: Enter task ID to associate, will replace all selected records' related tasks
task.clearDescription: Will clear all selected records' related tasks

dimension.description: Will replace all selected records' dimensions

success.createMessage: New event "{{title}}" has been created successfully

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Recurring Event
deleteConfirm.description: "{{title}}" is a recurring event. Please select deletion method:

single.title: Delete only today's instance
single.description: Keep recurrence rule, other instances unaffected

allFuture.title: Delete today and all future instances
allFuture.description: Keep recurrence rule but stop generating new instances

all.title: Delete all related instances and recurrence rule
all.description: Completely delete this recurring event, cannot be recovered

single.title: Only this occurrence
single.description: Update just the selected day; the recurrence rule stays the same.

allFuture.title: This and future occurrences
allFuture.description: Keep history intact but apply the new settings from this date forward.

all.title: Entire series
all.description: Update every instance, including past ones.

notice.single: Only {{date}} will change; other days stay untouched.
notice.all_future: Occurrences on and after {{date}} will adopt the new settings.
notice.all: Every instance in the series (past and future) will be updated.

empty.createFirstTagHint: Create your first tag to get started.

categoryManager.title: Categories
categoryManager.description: Create and switch between tag categories.

confirmDelete.title: Confirm Delete Tag
confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete tag "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

notes.noNotesWithFilterDescription: Try selecting other filter conditions or clear filters
notes.copyErrorMessage: Unable to copy note content, please manually select and copy text

bulkImport.sectionDescription: Paste multiple notes into the box and separate each note with at least three consecutive blank lines.
bulkImport.limitNotice: Notes are sent in batches of up to {{limit}} per request.
bulkImport.separatorHint: Blank lines containing spaces or tabs do not count as separators.
bulkImport.instructions: Click Preview to refresh the split result after editing the text.
bulkImport.previewEmptyDescription: Enter content that follows the separator rule and click Preview.
bulkImport.previewRequiredDescription: Please run a preview before submitting.
bulkImport.editEmptyDescription: Please enter at least one character.

banner.hint: Preview is not updated automatically. Click Preview after edits.

advancedSearch.title: Advanced Note Search

banner.hint: Adjust filters below and use Exit to return to quick notes

advancedSearch.keywordDescription: Search note content, supports multiple keywords separated by spaces
advancedSearch.taskRequired: Please choose a task before running the search.
advancedSearch.copyNoResultsMessage: Run a search first to generate results for copying.

batchEdit.title: Batch Edit Notes
batchEdit.description: Choose operation mode to update selected notes
batchEdit.partialTitle: Some notes could not be updated
batchEdit.partialMessage: Please review the failed note IDs

batchDelete.partialTitle: Some notes could not be deleted

theme.label: Select Theme
theme.description: Choose application theme. Selecting 'Follow System' will automatically switch between light/dark mode based on system settings.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.description: Customize your navigation bar to create a personal workspace that better fits your flow.

visibleModules.label: Visible Modules
visibleModules.description: Choose which modules appear in the side navigation bar.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Choose your preferred calendar system and weekly structure.

system.label: Calendar System
system.description: Default Gregorian calendar. When Mayan 13 Moon calendar is selected, each month has 28 days, with July 26th as New Year.

firstDay.label: First Day of Week
firstDay.description: Default Monday. When Mayan 13 Moon calendar is selected, this setting will be fixed to New Year start week and cannot be changed.

taskPlanning.label: Default Planning
taskPlanning.description: After selecting default planning, it will be automatically applied when creating tasks anywhere (can be modified in forms).

timeLogTaskPlanning.label: Auto-set Task Planning
timeLogTaskPlanning.description: Connect your actions with your plans. When a time log is linked to a task, it will be automatically scheduled for today.

habitActionsInPlanning.label: Show Habit Actions
habitActionsInPlanning.description: Make daily rituals a part of your daily plan. Choose whether to display habit actions here.

dimensionOrder.title: Dimension Order
dimensionOrder.description: Customize the display order of your dimensions, allowing you to prioritize the most important areas of your life.

defaultInboxVision.label: Select Default Vision
defaultInboxVision.description: Provide a default destination for fragmented ideas and tasks, ensuring every intention is captured.

timezone.label: Preferred Timezone
timezone.description: Select the timezone used for statistics and display

visions.title: Vision Experience
visions.description: Configure how invested time converts into vision experience points.

experienceRate.label: Experience per Hour
experienceRate.description: Set experience points gained for every hour of effort (1-3600). Per-vision overrides can be set when editing a vision.
experienceRate.applyAll: Save and apply to all visions

experienceTable.label: Vision Overrides
experienceTable.description: Review all visions and adjust their experience rates in one place.
experienceTable.hint: Edits here update the selected visions only. Allowed range: 1–{{max}} XP/h.
experienceTable.empty: No visions available yet. Create a vision to customize its experience rate.
experienceTable.invalidRate: Experience rate must be an integer between {{min}} and {{max}}.
experienceTable.toastError: Failed to update vision experience rates.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Control how note cards preview content before expanding.

minCollapsedLines.label: Preview lines before expanding
minCollapsedLines.description: Select how many lines remain visible when a note card is collapsed.

taskNotes.label: Include task-related notes in planning export
taskNotes.description: When exporting planning, attach all notes linked to tasks in the current period.

cycleNotes.label: Include notes created in the current cycle
cycleNotes.description: When exporting planning, also attach notes created within the current planning cycle (based on your calendar system).

dimensionSorter.instructions: Arrange left to right using the ↑↓ buttons.

finance.title: Finance
finance.description: Configure finance defaults for account trees, balances, and conversion dialogs.

primaryCurrency.label: Primary Currency
primaryCurrency.description: Select the base currency used when aggregating balances and building exchange tables.

llm.title: AI Access
llm.description: Manage encrypted BYOT (Bring Your Own Token) credentials for LiteLLM.

credentials.label: Bring Your Own Token
credentials.description: Tokens are encrypted and only the last four characters are shown after saving.
credentials.empty: No custom tokens yet. Add your first token below.

accountSecurity.title: Account Security
accountSecurity.description: Manage password and other sensitive security settings.
accountSecurity.changePasswordHint: After changing the password you will be signed out and must log in again.
accountSecurity.changePasswordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure.

full.title: Full Export
full.description: Export all financial data for the current account (accounts, cashflow, transactions).

tips.parentDoneAutoUpdate: When selecting a completed task as parent, the system will automatically set it to 'In Progress', because adding a subtask means the parent is not truly done.
tips.bulkContentDescription: Batch mode: the same vision + attributes apply to every line.
tips.bulkContentHelper: Each line becomes an individual task; blank lines are ignored.

agent.description: Chat with your personal AI assistant to get advice and help.

visions.description: Deconstruct long-range vision into actionable task trees.

tree.description: Each tree is a living vision, nurtured by the real time you invest in its growth.

habits.description: Design and track repeatable actions that shape your day.

planning.description: Place tasks on a day, week, month, or year planning cycle.

timelog.description: Record actual time and review how effort was spent.

insights.description: Review precomputed and live summaries from timelog data.

calendar.description: View planned events and actual timelog footprints.

hint.title: Tip:
hint.actualEnabled: Actual footprints enabled. Filter by a specific dimension, or keep 'All' to view all dimensions.

notes.description: Capture low-friction notes and link them to LifeOS entities.

sage-maxims.description: Collect and share distilled truths from the community.

persons.description: Manage people and their linked LifeOS activity.

finance.description: Track assets, liabilities, and balance snapshots to keep your financial intentions aligned with reality.

food-diary.description: Log your body's fuel source to understand the link between diet, energy, and mood.

settings.description: Manage LifeOS Web UI preferences and local settings.

invitations.description: Invite specific email addresses to register for beta access.
